title: Looking fro CRM creation
excerpt: Hello, I am looking for a professional to build up a CRM on Monday.com for me. I do not have the time to learn to do this myself and suspect that I would not do as good a job as someone who is more familiar with the proc…

posts.author: Jason_Fuller (Jason)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, I am looking for a professional to build up a CRM on Monday.com for me. I do not have the time to learn to do this myself and suspect that I would not do as good a job as someone who is more familiar with the process of setting up a CRM on Monday.

I currently use an Excel spreadsheet as my CRM but this is clunky and is becoming increasingly difficult to use as I bring on more staff. It would be a case of transferring this system to Monday.com.

This of course would be be paid work. I have had some quotes from UK based companies but they do seem to be quite expensive.

Many thanks,

Jason

posts.author: TeamEasy (Easy Mondays)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Jason_Fuller

We are Melbourne based and can accommodate any time differences easily.

Happy to help you move away from excel!
Our team prioritises value, drop us an email with your availability to connect at teameasy@easy-mondays.com

Have a great weekend!

posts.cookedHtml:

posts.cookedHtml:

posts.author: Colin2 (Colin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Jason,

I have set up custom CRMs on Monday for teams moving over from spreadsheets, so I know the ins and outs of making that transition smooth.
Happy to take a look at your current setup and see how it can be mapped efficiently.

You can reach out to me on my email here

Colin

posts.cookedHtml:

Sanjay Kumar Aggarwal
